com.pdftools
Class NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE

java.lang.Object
  com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE
Enclosing class:
NativeLibrary
public static class NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE
extends java.lang.Object

The page mode specifies how the document shall be displayed when opened.

Field Summary
static int ePageModeFullScreen
          Full-screen mode, with no menu bar, window controls, or any other window visible.
static int ePageModeUseAttachments
          (PDF 1.6) Attachments panel visible.
static int ePageModeUseNone
          Neither document outline nor thumbnail images visible.
static int ePageModeUseOC
          (PDF 1.5) Optional content group panel visible.
static int ePageModeUseOutlines
          Document outline visible.
static int ePageModeUseThumbs
          Thumbnail images visible.
